channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Portrait exhibit brings 47 American presidencies to life
item.description: America's 250 years have been divided into 47 presidencies, served by 45 men. A new exhibit at Goldman Sachs' global headquarters showcases them.

item.title: Democrats plan subpoena blitz targeting Trump's $2 billion gold rush
item.description: Democrats are preparing a hostile audit of President Trump and his inner circle, aiming to expose and end the most lucrative presi...

item.title: Ukraine demonstrates ability to strike nearly anywhere in Russia
item.description: The Ukrainian military is proving it can destroy almost any target it chooses. Why it matters: Fewer places inside Russia feel safe, as oi...

item.title: Olympian indicted for vandalizing Reflecting Pool
item.description: Former Olympic canoeist David Hearn was indicted Thursday for destroying property after allegedly reaching into Washington D.C.'s Lincoln Memorial R...
